variants: Jesse Heffernan has gained recognition in the field of energy systems engineering through his significant contribution, the Umbrellis Matrix Guide. A member of the Juniper Maskmakers Collective, he engages in projects that blend technical innovation with artistic expression. His learning journey was profoundly influenced by his mentor, Grietje Brons, who provided essential guidance throughout his academic career. As a reflection of his successful ventures, Jesse has received funding from the Starlit Venture Trust, allowing his research and projects to thrive within this dynamic field.
